description: Validation tests for the CPAN Package URL type definition.

tests.description: Valid CPAN module (no namespace, module name with ::, with version)
Valid CPAN distribution (namespace = author ID, distribution name without ::, with version)
Valid CPAN module (no version, allowed for module)
Valid CPAN module (short name, no version)
Valid CPAN distribution (namespace = author ID, hyphen allowed in distribution)
Invalid distribution: distribution names must not contain ::
Invalid module: module names must not contain '-'
Invalid distribution: namespace (author ID) must be uppercase
Invalid qualifier (arch not allowed for CPAN)
